entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: Social networking platform for professionals, source of contacts for review

entities.name: Kondo
entities.context: Tool for managing LinkedIn contacts, feeds into review queue

entities.name: CRM
entities.context: Customer relationship management system for storing approved contacts

entities.name: Aviato
entities.context: Contact enrichment service for approved CRM profiles

entities.name: LinkedIn Review Queue
entities.context: Workflow system for reviewing LinkedIn contacts and deciding CRM inclusion

relationships.context: Receives LinkedIn contacts from Kondo for review
Approved contacts get added to CRM
Approved contacts enriched with Aviato data
